name: Teriyaki Salmon
tagline: Lacquered teriyaki salmon with rice and steamed greens

hero.alt: Teriyaki salmon glazed dark over rice
hero.caption: teriyaki salmon — lacquered

steps.title: Whisk the teriyaki
steps.detail: Whisk soy, mirin, sake, brown sugar, ginger, garlic in a small bowl until sugar dissolves.
steps.tip: Don't pre-cook the sauce — reducing in the pan builds layers.

steps.title: Sear skin-down
steps.detail: Pat salmon dry. Heat oil in a non-stick pan over medium-high. Lay salmon skin-down; press 30 sec. Cook 4 min undisturbed.
steps.tip: Pressing the skin against the pan stops it from curling up.

steps.title: Flip and glaze
steps.detail: Flip salmon. Pour in teriyaki; tilt pan to bring sauce to one side and spoon over fish. Cook 2 min as sauce thickens to a glaze.
steps.tip: Glaze should syrup, not boil dry. Pull just before it tightens fully.

steps.title: Plate and shower
steps.detail: Plate salmon over rice; spoon remaining glaze over. Top with sesame seeds and scallions.
steps.tip: Steamed greens (broccoli, bok choy) on the side soak up the glaze beautifully.

healthFacts: Salmon's omega-3s reduce inflammation; pairing with greens supports the protective effect.
Mirin's sweetness offsets soy's salt without added sugar.
